reasons: E01 and E31 ran in fresh Codex desktop worktrees at exact activation commit 3b3683e.
Both runs used gpt-5.5 with medium reasoning effort and exposed exactly one codex-project-workflow skill.
Raw rollout traces show only the 486-character skill description; skill body, references, and governance documents each loaded zero characters.
E01 changed only target.txt and the exact expected content was independently verified.
E31 changed only src/invoice.py and the two neighboring unittest cases passed independently.

canonical_candidate_binding.line_ending_note: The approval record preserved mixed worktree LF/CRLF hashes. Fresh Windows worktrees may change worktree hashes through core.autocrlf; canonical Git blob hashes and commit identity are the durable cross-worktree binding.

next_action: Run the remaining E01-E36 evaluation cases in controlled batches before plugin packaging.
